authoritative_sources.name: AICPA Professional Standards
authoritative_sources.rationale: Provides guidance on professional conduct and ethical standards for accounting professionals including collections practices
authoritative_sources.decay_handling: Monitor for updates to ethical guidelines and professional conduct rules

authoritative_sources.name: IFAC International Standards
authoritative_sources.rationale: Establishes international auditing and assurance standards that impact collections practices
authoritative_sources.decay_handling: Track changes to IAASB standards affecting audit and collection procedures

authoritative_sources.name: Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)
authoritative_sources.rationale: Regulates debt collection activities to protect consumers
authoritative_sources.decay_handling: Monitor for regulatory updates and enforcement actions

unresolved_ambiguities: Specific approval thresholds for write-offs may vary by firm
Detailed collection call scripts may be proprietary
